description: CompositionBlue tunic made of 100% cotton, has a mandarin collar and a half buttoned placket, full sleeves with buttoned cuffs and a mid-arm button, belt, brand badge above the hem and a curved hemFitRegularWash careonly hand wash in cold water using a mild detergentWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleach, wring or tumble dryFlat dry in shadeMild iron, and do not iron on print/embellishment/embroideryThis season's understated trend is perfectly captured in this luxe tunic with its plush fabric. The button detailing and stitched belt in this piece gives it an interesting dimension. Style this tunic from s.oliver with leggings, closed-toe casual shoes, and a structured blazer.Model statisticsThe product is a size 40 on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
